summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Event Management Dashboard with JWT authentication, role-based access, event CRUD operations, registration system, QR tickets, analytics, and notifications. Backend achieved 100% test success rate, frontend achieved 95% functionality with minor navigation timing issues.

integration_issues.issue: Occasional timeout when navigating from event card to detail page - may be timing/routing related

passed_tests: User registration flow (both user and organizer roles)
Event browsing with filters and search
Event CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Integration between React frontend and FastAPI backend
